Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FlowSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowSettings2
public class FlowSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for FlowSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CanDebugFlowAsAnotherUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesEnforceApexCpuTimeLimit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesFormulaEnforceDataAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesFormulaGenerateHtmlOutput" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAccessToInvokedApexRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsApexPluginAccessModifierRespected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEmailSimpleRespectProfilesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnhancedFlowListViewVisible" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowApexContextRetired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowBlockAccessToSessionIdEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowBrEncodedFixEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowCustomPropertyEditorEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowDeployAsActiveEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowFieldFilterEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowFormulasFixEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowInterviewSharingEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowNullPreviousValueFixEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowPauseEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowReactiveScreensEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowUseApexExceptionEmailEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFlowViaRestUsesUserCtxtEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLightningRuntimeEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsManageFlowRequiredForAutomationCharts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSupportRollbackOnErrorForApexInvocableActionsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsTimeResumedInSameRunContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public void setMetadata(FlowSettings value)
      Sets the value of the metadata property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is FlowSettings
